headline: Platner 🦪🐚 DROPS OUT 💥 after Assault SHOCKER 🚫😱
text: Graham Platner 🦪🐚 the oyster-slingin’ Maine vet 🪖🌊 just YEETED his Senate run 🏃‍♂️💨 after Jenny Racicot’s SHOCKING assault allegations 💥😭! He swore the claims were “categorically FALSE” ❌🗣️ but the Dems 🚫💰 pulled the plug anyway – no more cash 💸🚫 for the populist oyster bro! Bernie Sanders 🧓🔥 and Liz Warren 👵🪄 yanked their endorsements like bad tattoos 🖤🧼, plus Ro Khanna, Ruben Gallego, Martin Heinrich all bounced 🏃‍♂️💨 while the DSCC and Maine Dems ghosted too 👻📉! Platner raged “no back-room DC deals” 🏛️🚫 and demanded an “open, transparent, democratic” replacement 🔍🗳️ before July 13 drop-dead line ⏰💀! Scandals stacked like a bad Reddit thread 📜🔥 – Nazi-tat cover-up 🇩🇪🧼, old posts blaming SA victims 🗣️🤦‍♂️, married sexting leaks 💌💍, and three exes spilling “erratic” tea ☕😤! Now the Maine Dems are speed-running a convention in two weeks to pick a new warrior 🛡️⚔️ against GOP queen Susan Collins 🐘👑 – Nirav Shah, Troy Jackson, Jordan Wood, Shenna Bellows, Dan Kleban all sliding into the DMs 🏃‍♂️📱 while Patrick Dempsey said “McDreamy is OUT” 🩺❌! Will the replacement ride the Platner wave 🌊 or sink the Senate flip dream? ⛵💥
